title: Software Engineer In Test Automation Testing (junior- senior level)
job_description: Job Description   Create detailed, comprehensive and well-structured test plans and test cases Design, develop and execute automation scripts using open source tools that is fast, scalable, easy to monitor and maintain Create code that's easy to read Able to perform Test Automation and set up frameworks on multiple application platforms like Web, Mobile - Android and API Work with the team to maintain, improve and clean your code Review each other's code and learn the software engineering best practices Work with deployments teams and resolve issues for the system Build and manage automated build/test/deployment environments  Qualifications   A formal degree in Computer Science is preferred, but candidates with demonstrable skills and experience are equally valued 5 years of overall experience in software testing for Senior level, with strong focus on automation. Hands-on experience in Web, Mobile, and API automation using tools like Selenium, Appium, and REST-based tools. Strong programming skills in at least one language (Java, Python, or JavaScript) with the ability to write clean and maintainable automation code. Experience working with automation frameworks such as WebdriverIO and BDD frameworks (e.g., Cucumber), including contributing to framework improvements. Good understanding of SDLC and STLC, with experience in Agile development environments. Experience in designing test strategies, writing test cases (positive, negative, edge cases), and identifying automation opportunities. Practical exposure to CI/CD pipelines (e.g., Jenkins, GitHub Actions), including integrating and maintaining automation suites. Experience in maintaining and scaling automation suites, ensuring stability and reliability of test execution. Ability to take ownership of features/modules and collaborate with cross-functional teams

title: System Developer
job_description: PT IDX Solusi Teknologi Informasi (IDXSTI) was established in November 2018 as a subsidiary of the Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) and other Self-Regulatory Organizations (SROs), including KPEI/IDClear and KSEI. IDXSTI focuses on providing Information Technology (IT) services for the Indonesian capital market and other financial industries. Our objective is to deliver the best IT solutions to support the growth and development of Indonesia’s capital market.  At IDXSTI, we are dedicated to pushing the boundaries of innovation in our industry. We are looking for a results-driven and integrated team player to join our Team.   Key Responsibilities:  Design, develop, and maintain applications and system modules that support IDXSTI's digital products and services.  Implement clean, efficient, and maintainable code aligned with best practices and internal standards.  Participate in requirement analysis, system design, and architecture discussions with Product, BA, and Engineering teams.  Build and integrate systems using internal and external APIs, including integration with market data or financial platforms.  Ensure high performance, stability, and security through testing, code review, and optimization.  Prepare and maintain technical documentation including system design, API specs, and deployment guides.  Collaborate with QA Engineers to support testing and ensure high-quality releases.  Troubleshoot issues in development, staging, and production environments.  Contribute to continuous improvement initiatives and adoption of new technologies.  Support deployment, monitoring, and maintenance activities with the infrastructure team.     Requirements:  Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Systems, or related fields.  Min. 1 year of experience in software development (fresh graduates with strong portfolios are welcome).  Proficiency in at least one of the following: Java, Go, Python, C#, or Node.js.  Strong understanding of API development (REST/GraphQL), microservices, and modern application architectures.  Experience with SQL/NoSQL databases and data modeling.  Familiarity with DevOps tools and CI/CD workflows (GitLab Cl, Jenkins, Docker) is a plus.  Strong analytical, problem-solving, and debugging skills.  Able to work collaboratively in a dynamic environment.  Good communication skills and ability to produce clear technical documentation.  Candidates with knowledge of Brokerage Office Systems (BOFIS), trading workflows, or capital market back-office processes will have a significant advantage.

title: QA Engineer (Enterprise Efficiency) - Sea Labs
job_description: The Engineering and Technology team is at the core of the Shopee platform development. The team is made up of a group of passionate engineers from all over the world, striving to build the best systems with the most suitable technologies. Our engineers do not merely solve problems at hand; We build foundations for a long-lasting future. We don't limit ourselves on what we can or can't do; we take matters into our own hands even if it means drilling down to the bottom layer of the computing platform. Shopee's hyper-growing business scale has transformed most "innocent" problems into huge technical challenges, and there is no better place to experience it first-hand if you love technologies as much as we do.  About the Team:  About Sea Labs Indonesia  Sea Labs is at the core of the Sea platforms development, supporting diverse business lines from e-commerce, supply chain, games, payment and finance, among many others. The strong growth and unique positioning of Sea's e-commerce business, Shopee, spurred the launch of Sea Labs Indonesia. Since its inception, the group of passionate engineers have charted the course to drive the best experience for our users in Indonesia, many of which solutions are even adapted to other markets in the region.  Sea's hyper-growing business scale has transformed most "innocent" problems into huge technical challenges, and there is no better place to experience world-class projects first-hand if you love technologies as much as we do. Together with our passionate and driven teams, you'll get to develop your skills, build on industry knowledge and collaborate with global teams in a dynamic space. Browse our Sea Labs Indonesia team openings to see how you can make an impact with us.  About team  The Enterprise Efficiency team is dedicated to transforming workplace productivity through seamless integration of enterprise communication, open platform capabilities, and management systems covering HR, finance, and operational tools. Our products power the daily workflows of thousands of employees across Sea group companies.  Our product lines include SeaTalk (enterprise communication and collaboration platform) and PFMS (People and Financial Management System). We are currently driving enterprise initiatives where we actively leverage AI-powered tools and LLM integrations to enhance product capabilities and accelerate engineering workflows.  Job Description:  Write and execute test cases based on PRD requirements and technical design documents, covering functional, regression, and edge-case scenarios. Perform manual testing across web and mobile platforms, ensuring product quality before each release. Write and maintain automated test scripts for API and E2E test suites under the guidance of the QA Lead. Participate in test case review sessions and contribute to improving test coverage and test design quality. Log, track, and verify bug fixes with clear reproduction steps, expected vs. actual results, and severity classification. Collaborate with frontend and backend engineers to understand feature implementations and identify testability gaps early. Support regression testing cycles during release sprints, ensuring timely completion without compromising coverage. Participate in UAT coordination with product managers and stakeholders. Contribute to QA process improvements including test documentation standards, bug triage workflows, and environment setup procedures. Coordinate with cross-site teams (Singapore, Shenzhen) on shared testing efforts during multi-team releases.  Requirements:  1–4 years of experience in software QA or quality engineering. Solid understanding of software testing fundamentals: test case design, boundary value analysis, equivalence partitioning, and regression testing. Hands-on experience with manual testing across web applications; mobile testing experience is a plus. Basic to intermediate programming skills in at least one of: Python, Java, or JavaScript/TypeScript — able to read code, write simple test scripts, and debug test failures. Familiarity with at least one test automation framework (Selenium, Playwright, Cypress, pytest, or similar) — or strong willingness and aptitude to learn. Experience with API testing tools (Postman, REST client) and basic understanding of REST API concepts. Familiarity with bug tracking and test management tools (Jira, TestRail, or similar). Proficient in using AI-assisted tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude, GitHub Copilot) to accelerate test case generation, debugging, and documentation workflows. Detail-oriented with strong analytical and problem-solving skills. Good communication skills — able to write clear bug reports, participate in cross-functional discussions, and flag risks to the team proactively. Good product sense and curiosity in defining best shape for the product. Self-motivated with a willingness to learn test automation and grow into a quality engineering role.

title: Full Stack Software Engineer (CAD Rooms Cloud PDM)
job_description: About the Role  We are looking for a talented Full Stack Software Engineer to join our engineering team. In this role, you will design, build, and maintain scalable web applications and services across the entire technology stack. You will collaborate closely with product managers, designers, and fellow engineers to deliver high-quality software that powers our platform and delights our users.   Responsibilities  Design, develop, and maintain full stack applications using TypeScript across frontend and backend services.  Build and manage containerized applications and development environments with Docker.  Design, implement, and optimize PostgreSQL database schemas, queries, and migrations.  Collaborate with cross-functional teams to translate product requirements into robust, scalable technical solutions.  Write clean, well-tested, and well-documented code following engineering best practices.  Participate in code reviews and contribute to improving team development processes and tooling.  Troubleshoot and resolve production issues, ensuring high availability and performance of services.  Contribute to architectural decisions and help shape the technical direction of the platform.   Required Qualifications  3+ years of professional experience in full stack software development.  Strong proficiency in TypeScript for both frontend (React, Next.js, or similar) and backend (Node.js) development.  Hands-on experience with Docker for containerization, orchestration, and local development workflows.  Solid experience designing and working with PostgreSQL, including schema design, query optimization, and migrations.  Familiarity with RESTful APIs and/or GraphQL.  Experience with version control systems (Git) and CI/CD pipelines.  Strong problem-solving skills and a passion for writing high-quality, maintainable code.  Excellent communication and collaboration skills in a team environment.   Nice to Have  Experience with advanced PostgreSQL features such as trigger functions, Row Level Security (RLS), stored procedures, and database access policies.  Experience with Deno as an alternative or complement to Node.js for backend development.  Experience with AWS services (EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, ECS, or similar).  Proficiency or working knowledge of Golang for building performant backend services or microservices.  Proficiency or working knowledge of Rust, particularly for maintaining and developing our desktop application built with Tauri.  Experience with 3D-related engineering, such as WebGL, Three.js, Unity, Unreal Engine, or real-time rendering pipelines.  Familiarity with infrastructure-as-code tools (Terraform, CloudFormation) and Kubernetes.  Experience with performance profiling, monitoring, and observability tools.

title: [294] Quality Assurance Engineer
job_description: Responsibilities   Contribute or lead engineering efforts from planning, execution, and delivery to solving complex engineering problems in tools and testing Develop scalable and reliable tests for software and feature quality at both the system level, user levels both functional and nonfunctional. Design, create, modify, and execute test strategies/plans and drive to improve software testing processes and methodologies. Experience with API testing (REST, gRPC, GraphQL). Strong knowledge of database querying and data modeling. Familiar with logs analysis and debugging. Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills. Familiar with testing & observability tools: Git, DB Client, REST Client, K6, Cypress, Appium, New Relic, VS Code. Experience in multiple testing types: API, UI, Stress, Regression, Blackbox & Whitebox (Web & Mobile). Work Arrangement  Location: South Jakarta Working model: Work from Office (WFO) Employment: 6-month contract (extendable)  BINAR Academy aims to unlock and channel human potential so we can help the world turn into a better place. One of the ways we strive to do that is to channel potential talents to impactful opportunities using our very own job connector, BINAR Job Connect.  BINAR Job Connect has connected up to 250 talents & candidates; whether it be young & aspirational fresh graduate to tech-savvy team leaders, individuals who decided to start from scratch, and junior engineers to skilled product managers to our experienced hiring partners. title: e commerce operator

Dalam peran ini, Anda akan memainkan peran kunci dalam mengelola dan mengoptimalkan pengalaman belanja online pelanggan kami, serta mendukung upaya pemasaran digital kami untuk meningkatkan penjualan dan visibilitas merek.  Tanggung Jawab Utama  Mengelola dan memperbarui konten toko online, termasuk deskripsi produk, gambar, dan promosi.  Menganalisis data penjualan dan perilaku pelanggan untuk mengidentifikasi peluang peningkatan dan optimalisasi.  Melakukan pemeliharaan dan pembaruan teratur pada platform e-commerce kami untuk memastikan pengalaman belanja yang lancar bagi pelanggan.  Berkoordinasi dengan tim pemasaran dan penjualan untuk mengembangkan dan mengimplementasikan strategi pemasaran digital untuk meningkatkan visibilitas dan penjualan online.  Mengelola pengadaan dan inventaris produk, memastikan ketersediaan stok yang memadai.  Memantau dan menanggapi umpan balik serta ulasan pelanggan untuk terus meningkatkan pengalaman belanja.  Keterampilan, Kualifikasi, dan Pengalaman yang Dibutuhkan  Minimal 1 tahun pengalaman dalam peran terkait e-commerce atau pemasaran digital.  Mahir dalam menggunakan platform e-commerce, seperti shopee, tiktok shop  Pemahaman yang kuat tentang pemasaran digital, termasuk SEO, SEM, dan analitik web.  Kemampuan analitis yang baik untuk mengidentifikasi tren dan wawasan yang dapat ditindaklanjuti dari data penjualan dan perilaku pelanggan.  Kreativitas dan kemampuan untuk mengembangkan konten pemasaran yang menarik secara visual.  Keterampilan komunikasi yang baik, baik tertulis maupun lisan, untuk berkolaborasi dengan tim lintas-fungsional.  Kemampuan untuk bekerja dalam lingkungan yang berubah-ubah dan mematuhi tenggat waktu yang ketat.  Manfaat Utama Bekerja di PT Panjabridge Indo Trading  Gaji yang kompetitif dan tunjangan menarik.  Lingkungan kerja yang dinamis dan mendukung, dengan peluang untuk berkembang secara profesional.  Tunjangan kesehatan komprehensif dan program kesejahteraan karyawan.  Jadwal kerja yang fleksibel dan opsi untuk bekerja jarak jauh.  Kesempatan untuk terlibat dalam proyek-proyek menarik dan inovatif di bidang ecommerce.  Jika Anda tertarik untuk bergabung dengan tim kami yang dinamis, lamar sekarang untuk peran e-Commerce Operator ini.

title: Graphic Designer (Digital & Print)

In this key role, you will be responsible for designing, developing and maintaining high-performance web applications using the latest .NET technologies. What we're looking for  8+ years of experience in developing enterprise-level web applications using .NET technologies  Proficient in C#, .NET Core, ASP.NET MVC, and modern web frameworks such as Angular or React  Strong understanding of relational databases (SQL Server) and NoSQL databases (MongoDB, Cosmos DB)  Hands-on experience in designing and consuming RESTful APIs  Familiarity with DevOps practices, including CI/CD pipelines and cloud-based hosting platforms  Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills with a sharp attention to detail  Strong communication and collaboration skills to work effectively with cross-functional teams  Ability to mentor and guide more junior developers in the team  Must Have & Desired Skills:   • In-depth knowledge of cloud computing concepts and Microsoft Azure services. • Proficiency in scripting and programming languages such as PowerShell, Python, and C#. • Experience with Azure-specific services like Azure SQL Database, Azure DevOps, and Azure Active Directory, Azure Data Factory, Key Vault, Function Apps, App Services, API Management. • Strong understanding of DevOps principles and tools. • Knowledge of security best practices and compliance standards for cloud environments. • Excellent problem-solving and troubleshooting skills. • Strong collaboration and communication skills, with the ability to work effectively with cross-functional teams. • Continuous learning and skill upgradation to keep up with the dynamic nature of cloud technologies.  Desired Skills: • Experience with front-end technologies and frameworks like Angular. • Familiarity with agile and DevOps practices. • Previous experience in a similar role within a fast-paced environment.  Education: Bachelor's degree in technology or equivalent.

finalized  –   Implement Figma designs into production-quality front-end code across all Balimmo platforms: 3 websites, 2 mobile apps, 3 internal tools  –   Build and maintain a unified design system — components, tokens, and interaction states — consistent across all products  –   Integrate front-end work with back-end developers: handle API connections, loading states, error handling, and real (A/B tests, conversion funnels, heatmaps) to validate UI decisions with data rather than assumptions  –   Optimize existing interfaces for performance, responsiveness, and accessibility  What matters most:  –   You see immediately when something does not look or feel right — spacing, hierarchy, interaction — and you know how to fix it  –   You are attentive to detail without being paralyzed by title: Senior Backend Software Engineer (Distributed Systems) - Online Transportation
job_description: ADECCO INDONESIA - Senior Backend Software Engineer (Distributed Systems) - WE ARE HIRING!  Job Title: Senior Backend Software Engineer (Distributed Systems)  Location: South Jakarta  Industry: Multinational Online Transportation Platform Company  Employment Type: 6 months contract under Adecco Indonesia (Extendable)     Get to know the Team The Fulfilment tech family is one of the pillars enabling our client to out-serve our customers and partners in different businesses and marketplaces across Southeast Asia. We are working on high throughput, real-time distributed systems that use advanced software engineering techniques to solve hundreds of millions of requests per day. We are a distributed team in 4 different locations: Singapore, Beijing, Indonesia, and Malaysia. Our communication is in English, both in spoken and written form.  Our mission is to offer the best-in-class products and experiences to our driver partners as to increase adoption and engagement of our services. Improve driver partner opportunities and efficiency in order to fulfill customer orders without fail, rain or shine. And to create efficient marketplaces by determining an optimal price that is both sustainable and loved by our partners and customers.  The Day-to-Day Activities  Design and write with the Go language to improve the availability, scalability, latency, and efficiency of our client's range of services.  Work with the engineering team to explore and create new design/architectures geared toward scale and performance.  Participate in code and design reviews to maintain our high development standards.  Engage in service capacity and demand planning, software performance analysis, tuning, and optimization.  Collaborate with product and experience teams to define and prototype feature specifications.  Work closely with the infrastructure team in building and scaling back-end services as well as performing root cause analysis investigations.  Design, build, analyze, and fix large-scale systems.  Pro-actively debug and solve production incidents during your on-call shift.  Participate in interview loops to help our client continue hiring top industry talent.  Provide technical guidance, mentorship, and knowledge sharing to peers.  The Must-Haves  A degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Technology or related fields.  5+ years of experience in software engineering in a distributed systems environment.  Experience with Golang, including an understanding of its core syntax and semantics, familiarity with its standard library, its concurrency primitives, and experience in developing and optimizing Golang applications.  Proficiency in maintaining operational excellence and site reliability, including familiarity with monitoring system performance, ensuring system health, and managing service capacity planning.  Strong Computer Science fundamentals in algorithms and data structures. Familiarity with running large-scale web services; understanding of systems internals and networking are a plus.  Experience in developing distributed systems with high throughput and scalability, including a deep understanding of streaming systems and queuing models and their respective integration into these systems.  Possess excellent communication, sharp analytical abilities with proven design skills, and the ability to think critically of the current system in terms of growth and stability.  You can be a good coder in any language (C++, C, Java, Scala, Rust, Haskell, OCaml, Erlang, Python, Ruby, PHP, Node.JS, C#, etc.), but willing to work on Golang  The Good-to-Haves  Expert knowledge in databases, including relational databases such as MySQL and NoSQL databases like AWS DynamoDB, Scylla, and others, accompanied by a distinct understanding of various design decision implications.  Capable of architecting highly scalable solutions while keeping cost-effectiveness in mind.  Experience in coaching and mentoring junior developers, providing guidance on coding standards, and promoting a collaborative learning environment within the team.  Demonstrate a keen sense of product thinking, being able to align technical strategies with product goals, and understanding how development decisions can directly impact end-users.  Tech Stack : Redis, MySQL, DynamoDB, Kafka, and Elasticsearch for data storage.  These services are orchestrated using Kubernetes and run on the AWS cloud infrastructure, equipped with auto-scaling abilities.  Our mobile app platform coverage includes native iOS, and Android, written in Swift/Kotlin, RxJava, and Flutter.  Our previously developed front-end is built on Rails, HTML5, CSS, React, and Javascript.utilizing   We use GitLab for our code repository and we adhere to the basic Continuous Delivery tenets utilising a host of tools to support our release pipeline and code quality. These include GitLab CI, DataDog, Code Climate, and Jenkins.

title: PowerBuilder Developer
job_description: Saat ini kami sedang membuka kesempatan bagi kandidat terbaik untuk bergabung bersama kami yang akan ditempatkan di perusahaan klien kami.     Deskripsi Pekerjaan  Sebagai PowerBuilder Developer, Anda akan bertanggung jawab untuk memelihara dan meningkatkan aplikasi PowerBuilder yang sudah ada. Anda akan bekerja sama dengan developer senior untuk memastikan stabilitas sistem serta melakukan perbaikan dan pengembangan yang diperlukan.   Tanggung Jawab  Melakukan pemeliharaan, debugging, dan peningkatan pada aplikasi PowerBuilder.  Menulis dan mengoptimalkan SQL queries serta stored procedures yang kompleks.  Menganalisis serta menyelesaikan masalah aplikasi dan bottleneck performa.  Mengembangkan fitur baru dan laporan berdasarkan kebutuhan bisnis.  Mendokumentasikan perubahan kode, modifikasi sistem, dan proses teknis.  Mendukung proses data migration dan integrasi sistem jika diperlukan.  Berkolaborasi dengan pengguna bisnis untuk memahami kebutuhan dan memberikan solusi teknis.  Berpartisipasi dalam sesi knowledge transfer serta mempelajari praktik terbaik PowerBuilder.  Memastikan aplikasi memenuhi standar keamanan dan integritas data.   Kualifikasi  Pendidikan minimal S1 Ilmu Komputer, Teknologi Informasi, atau bidang terkait.  Memiliki pengalaman 1–4 tahun dalam pengembangan perangkat lunak.  Memiliki pengalaman dengan teknologi desktop atau client-server seperti Visual Basic, Delphi, atau framework legacy serupa.  Menguasai SQL dan konsep database dengan baik, termasuk query kompleks, stored procedures, dan konektivitas database.  Bersedia mempelajari dan bekerja dengan teknologi PowerBuilder.  Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi bahasa Inggris yang baik, baik lisan maupun tulisan.  Teliti serta memiliki kemampuan analisis yang kuat.  Mampu bekerja secara mandiri serta mendokumentasikan perubahan teknis dengan jelas.

Pengalaman minimal 2 tahun sebagai supervisor di perpustakaan.  Pemahaman yang kuat tentang prinsip dan prosedur perpustakaan.  Keakraban dengan sistem otomasi perpustakaan dan database.  Menguasai Microsoft Office dan Slims. Penempatan di Cinere – Depok.  Qualifikasi sbb :   Rasionalisasi material, standardisasi dan pengayaan setiap item berdasarkan Standar Katalogisasi  Meninjau, Membersihkan, dan Memperbarui deskripsi master material agar lebih efektif dan efisien berdasarkan informasi yang tersedia dari permintaan pengguna  Nilai standar terhadap nilai yang diekstraksi di kolom terpisah.  Memastikan semua nilai atribut Wajib terisi dan jika tidak dapat diisi dengan nilai yang tersedia, lakukan pencarian web berdasarkan referensi Pabrikan seperti nomor Bagian, nomor Model  Melakukan pemeriksaan kualitas menyeluruh atas pekerjaan yang dilakukan oleh staf operator gudang.   Menerapkan proses penjaminan mutu untuk menjaga keakuratan dan keandalan data  Melakukan Verifikasi Fisik di Gudang.  Menggali dan mengembangkan data besar (big data) untuk membantu dalam hal pembuatan keputusan yang lebih baik

title: Junior IT Testing
job_description: Job Desc:  Execute software testing activities to support SIT (System Integration Testing) and UAT (User Acceptance Testing) processes in the banking industry.  Analyze business and system requirements to design and develop effective test scenarios and test cases.  Perform testing across multiple platforms, including API, Mobile, Web, and Desktop applications.  Document test results, defects, and overall testing progress in accordance with defined test scripts and standards.  Collaborate with developers, business analysts, and stakeholders to ensure issues are properly identified and resolved.  Support defect tracking, retesting, and validation processes to ensure system quality before release.   Qualiciations:  Minimum 2 years of experience as a Software Tester, with hands-on involvement in SIT/UAT within the banking industry.  Strong understanding of requirement analysis and test case/test script creation.  Experience in testing across multiple platforms: API, Mobile, Web, and Desktop applications.  Ability to perform structured and detailed test documentation.  Familiarity with defect tracking and test management tools.  Knowledge of automation testing is a plus.

title: Software Integration Project Manager
job_description: Area of responsibility  Successfully run and complete projects implementing Vault Management, Warehouse management and/or Production software with additional developments within our client’s organization, within the agreed timelines, budget and quality criteria.  Contributing to project budget calculations and presentations to clients in the pre-sales phase.  Management of resources and distribution of tasks across projects in coordination with the resources involved.  Within quotation processes, the SW Project Manager analyses the implementation strategy and impact.  Within projects the SW Project Manager is able to write requirements, work with the development team and perform acceptance tests.     Main tasks   Integrate Software Products  SW Product Integration capabilities  Proven experience of file transfer mechanism, new integration platforms/APIs  Porting or migration from legacy integration footprints to modern integration landscapes  Large application implementations with significant integration components including ESB, web-services, file transfers, point to point integrations     Execute resource management  Anticipating on project timelines by resource allocation scenarios with a horizon of 3-36 months.  Continuous resource and (project) task allocation management based on the dynamics.  Ownership of the project related resource anticipation sheet with a 3-36 month horizon.  Continuous management of proper task allocation and commitment across projects.  Discussing and challenging task requirements and anticipated effort.  Anticipating and discussing development requirements with the Product and Service Manager (internal and external) for alignment with project timelines.  Control project activities of all involved stakeholders and address issues like missing tasks, improper task descriptions, non-committed tasks, overdue tasks, etc.  Managing people’s proper project contributions regarding taking task and due date responsibility and delivering high quality.        Manage and execute projects  Managing large projects or programs with multiple projects or work streams operating in parallel with internal and external dependencies  Executing projects with significant third party dependencies and stakeholder management to align delivery time frames and testing  Creation of detailed project plans consisting of scope, deliverables, budget, delivery and lead times, resource planning, risks & mitigations, communication and reporting.  Organize proper project teams and their involvement in the creation of plans and commitment to the tasks.  Monitor and manage project involved in order to achieve quality and timely deliveries.  Coaching of project involved and Sales team members regarding project management.  Manage risks, resources, issues across all projects with a horizon 3-36 months.  Intervene when project involved cannot resolve project issues.  Plan and manage transfers from project to support.  Regular communication with and visits to clients where projects are operative, informing them about the progress of the projects.  Organization and execution of the steering committee meetings and ensure proper governance.  Organize project evaluations and lessons learned registration, for future use.  Continuous improvement of the processes.     Authorities  Management of implementation project budgets.  Deciding on (priorities relating to) the use of internal and external employees.  Deciding on task allocations.  Deciding on project standards and methodologies.     Result areas  (Client) project objectives and results.  Commercial project success.  Project organisation - quality and effectiveness.  Satisfaction of principals, clients, relations.  Quality and implementation of improvement suggestions.        Job requirements   Knowledge  Project management  Handling cash and cash management processes  Concepts and models for supply chain integration and logistics  Software product and services of G+D  Business process (re)design  G+D Strategy  Skills  Project management  Interpersonal skills (including communication)  Planning and organizing  Conflict handling     Competences  Ability to remain positive, with a 'can do' attitude  Ability to find pragmatic solutions to challenges  Forward thinking  Result orientation  Managing performance  Decisiveness  Persuasiveness  External awareness

title: Entry Level Full Stack Developer & AI Research
job_description: Kesempatan Kami dari perusahaan Nora Dynamic Sport, perusahaan teknologi yang berbasis di Surabaya, Jawa Timur, sedang mencari Entry Level Full Stack Developer & AI Research untuk bergabung dengan tim kami. Dalam peran ini, Anda akan berperan penting dalam pengembangan aplikasi digital dan melakukan penelitian terkait teknologi AI yang inovatif untuk mendorong pertumbuhan bisnis kami.  Tanggung Jawab  Merancang dan mengembangkan aplikasi web dan seluler yang andal dan berskala tinggi menggunakan teknologi stack terbaru.  Melakukan penelitian dan pengembangan di bidang kecerdasan buatan (AI) untuk meningkatkan fungsionalitas produk kami.  Bekerja dengan tim lintas-fungsi untuk mengidentifikasi dan menerapkan solusi inovatif.  Menjaga dan memperbaiki infrastruktur aplikasi saat dibutuhkan.  Memastikan kode yang ditulis berkualitas tinggi dan sesuai dengan standar industri.  Berkontribusi pada proses pengujian dan penjaminan kualitas.  Persyaratan  Gelar sarjana dalam Ilmu Komputer, Teknik Informatika, atau bidang terkait.  Memiliki pemahaman yang baik tentang berbagai teknologi web, seperti HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, dan database.  Pengalaman dalam pengembangan aplikasi back-end menggunakan bahasa pemrograman seperti Python, Java, atau PHP.  Pengetahuan dasar tentang machine learning, deep learning, dan algoritma AI.  Kemampuan pemecahan masalah yang kuat dan pemikiran kritis.  Mampu bekerja dalam tim dan berkomunikasi dengan efektif.  Selalu ingin belajar dan mengikuti perkembangan teknologi terbaru.  Manfaat  Gaji kompetitif dan paket tunjangan yang menarik.  Lingkungan kerja yang dinamis dan kolaboratif.  Kesempatan untuk belajar dan berkembang melalui pelatihan dan mentoring.  Fleksibilitas dalam pengaturan kerja, termasuk opsi bekerja jarak jauh.  Asuransi kesehatan yang komprehensif dan tunjangan lainnya.  Budaya perusahaan yang mendukung keseimbangan kehidupan kerja.  Tentang Kami Nora Dynamic Sport adalah perusahaan teknologi yang berfokus pada pengembangan solusi digital inovatif untuk industri olahraga dan gaya hidup. Kami bertujuan untuk mengubah cara orang berolahraga dan berinteraksi dengan olahraga melalui aplikasi, perangkat pintar, dan teknologi AI. Dengan tim yang berdedikasi dan berkomitmen pada inovasi, kami terus memperluas jangkauan kami di pasar global.  Jika Anda tertarik untuk menjadi bagian dari perjalanan kami, lamar posisi ini sekarang dan bergabunglah dengan tim kami yang dinamis!
